use_cases: Creative portfolio landing pages showcasing visual work in a curved gallery arrangement
Product showcases arranged in an arc pattern for e-commerce hero sections
Photography or design agency websites displaying work collections
Digital art galleries with non-traditional image presentation
Brand landing pages with featured work arranged in a decorative arc
ai_summary: A visually distinctive hero component that arranges images in a curved arc pattern, creating an elegant gallery presentation. Features responsive sizing with configurable radius and card dimensions for different breakpoints. The component supports light/dark themes and uses a geometric approach to distribute images evenly along an arc trajectory, making it ideal for creative portfolios, media showcases, and brand landing pages seeking a non-traditional gallery layout.
